ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade data */,
  "trading_day" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument during the trading day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument during the trading day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the instrument on that day */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest for the traded contracts */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the trade occurred */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., futures, options) */,
  "settlement_price" REAL /* Settlement price for the trading day */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of trades for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_trading_day FOREIGN KEY ("trading_day") REFERENCES trading_days ("trading_day")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., commodity, equity) */,
  "contract_size" INTEGER /* Size of the contract in the underlying asset */,
  "tick_size" REAL /* Minimum price movement for the instrument */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date for the contract */,
  "underlying_asset" TEXT /* Underlying asset for the contract (e.g., corn, crude oil) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_days" (
  "trading_day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading day */,
  "trading_day" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the day is a market holiday */,
  "market_open_time" TEXT /* Time when the market opens */,
  "market_close_time" TEXT /* Time when the market closes */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume traded on the trading day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade execution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated trade data */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the trade executed */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage used for the trade */,
  "margin" REAL /* Margin required for the trade */,
  "trade_location" TEXT /* Location where the trade was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trading_data ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report summarizes */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of market activities */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "market_conditions" TEXT /* Summary of market conditions */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert should trigger */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert is active */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the alert is active */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alert checks */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Custom message for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_volatility" (
  "volatility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol related to the volatility */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the volatility measurement */,
  "volatility_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of market volatility */,
  "volatility_source" TEXT /* Source of the volatility data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "volatility_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate volatility (e.g., historical, implied) */,
  "volatility_period" TEXT /* Period over which volatility is measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volatility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_volatility_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade history record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade execution */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of contracts traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which contracts were traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., market, limit) */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the trade */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage used for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trading_data ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification delivery (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method of delivery (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the setting */,
  "setting_key" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., trading, alerts) */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "setting_status" TEXT /* Status of the setting (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol for which the risk is assessed */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Score representing the risk level */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "risk_factor" TEXT /* Main risk factor for the instrument */,
  "risk_source" TEXT /* Source of the risk data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "risk_model" TEXT /* Risk model used for the assessment */,
  "risk_assessor" TEXT /* Name of the person or system that assessed the risk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)
